{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Heiress
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Leah]] is addressed as [[Heiress]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Valinhall Travelers looking for assignment, Heiress," Indirial said.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
